_comment: Golden Goose Eggs — the 3-5 outcomes that matter most right now. Defined and redefined by theme-review. Orient checks these first. A failing GGE triggers an immediate priority-0 backlog story.

eggs.title: Delivery machine is self-orienting and self-healing
eggs.rationale: The ceremonies loop must decide what to do next without human input, heal SMART failures by splitting, and close sprints cleanly regardless of completion. This is the meta-capability that accelerates everything else.

eggs.title: Living state docs answer 'where are we' without reading history
eggs.rationale: Every agent that touches this repo must be able to orient in under 2 minutes by reading two files. Without this, every session starts with archaeology. Rewritten each sprint by the sync ceremony.

eggs.title: Cluster contract is current, enforced, and machine-checked
eggs.rationale: Sovereignty means nothing if the cluster contract is a document nobody reads. It must be a gate — orient checks it exists and is current, and the bootstrap process references it explicitly.

eggs.title: Mental model is coherent — one vocabulary, one hierarchy
eggs.rationale: Phase vs increment vs sprint, phase field vs epicId — vocabulary fractures compound into delivery failures. The sync ceremony audits this every sprint. Story 040 (phase→increment migration) is the current active fix.
